title: KitchenPerfected 500w 1.5Ltr Table Blender with Mill - 2 Speed Settings - Pulse Setting - Separate Grinder Mill Attachment -Plastic Jug - Black - E5014BK
availability_text: Only 13 left in stock (more on the way).
features: 2 SPEED SETTINGS: Option 1 will operate the motor continuously at a low/medium rate. Option 2 will operate the motor continuously at the maximum rate for a finer blend
PULSE FUNCTION BUTTON: Twist the dial to the pulse function to operate the motor in short bursts. The motor will only operate for the duration that you hold in the Pulse position.
STAINLESS STEEL BLADES: The stainless steel blades rotate rapidly to finely chop and blend ingredients into a smooth liquid texture.
GRINDER MILL INCLUDED: This blender comes with a grinder mill attachment that can be used in place of the plastic jug to grind/mill coffee, spices, herbs and more.
RUBBER SUCTION FEET: The feet will stick to the kitchen surface to ensure that the blender is sturdy and will stay in place during operation.
description: The KitchenPerfected 500w 1.5Ltr Table Blender with Mill is perfect for any kitchen. With 2 speed settings it is suitable for lots of different ingredients. It also has a pulse function button which provides short, powerful bursts if this is what is required. The blades are stainless steel, these rotate rapidly to finely chop and blend ingredients in to a smooth liquid texture. As well as the plastic blending jug, also included is a grinder/mill attachment, you attach this in place of the jug and can then grind your coffee beans, spices, herbs and more. An opening in the lid allows for continuous additional feeding whilst blending. Rubber suction feet provide grip, they will stick to the kitchen surface to ensure the blender stays in place whilst in operation. Box Includes: 1 KitchenPerfected 500w 1.5Ltr Table Blender with Mill Plastic Jug with Lid Grinder Mill Attachment Instruction Manual
